data.content: Approved implementation review for commit 85a8d04f on branch foolery-4dc6-lease-investigation-skill (branch is now identical to main). The new skill covers dev (.foolery-logs, port 3000) and installed (~/.config/foolery/logs, port 3210) log roots, correlates lease/session/server logs, includes heuristics for hung turns and completed-without-progress outcomes, and the .claude mirror matches. Sanity gates passed on the reviewed artifact: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
